title: handlers_profile_chat: NameError process_messages вЂ” lazy module import
summary: Production regression after handlers.py decomposition (entry 20260419-002). Closures _flush, _flush_text, _flush_group inside register_profile_chat called process_messages() which lives in handlers.py module scope and was not imported in extracted handlers_profile_chat.py. title: UI freeze fix: price-axis vertical scale single owner (LWC vs autoscaleInfoProvider split-brain)
summary: Repro: LMB drag on price-axis (small Y move) -> chart freeze + wheel-on-axis becomes horizontal zoom instead of vertical. Root cause: split-brain ownership of vertical price scale. LWC handleScale.axisPressedMouseMove.price=true sets internal priceRange on priceScale(right) bypassing autoScale; our autoscaleInfoProvider returns state.manualRange. Both fight per render frame -> visual freeze. Fix: (1) engine.ts axisPressedMouseMove.price=false (LWC no longer touches Y axis interaction); (2) interaction.ts +30 LOC custom axis-drag vertical zoom (anchor=midpoint, exp(dy*0.005)). Single owner = state.manualRange. All Y operations (wheel-on-axis, shift+wheel, pane drag, NEW axis drag, dblclick reset) go through applyManualRange().
verify: vite build OK -> dist/assets/index-CHIl9YXP.js 334.21 kB. Manual: drag down on axis expands range (zoom out), drag up contracts (zoom in), wheel-on-axis after drag works (no freeze), pane pan works, dblclick resets to auto. Debug probes [PriceAxis] show axisZoom.start at drag begin and axisZoom:true at pointerup.

summary: Volume histogram: hide right-edge '0' axis label on preview
details: Set lastValueVisible: false on the HistogramSeries options. The axis label rendered '0' during preview ticks because the in-progress bar carries v=0 from tick-relay path and (sometimes) from broker preview. Bars themselves render correctly at 0px height — only the axis label was visible noise.
why: Volume on this chart is read by relative bar height; the absolute right-edge label provides no information and creates persistent visual noise during live ticks. Crosshair tooltip already exposes exact volume on hover.
goal: Clean volume rail with no phantom zero label during preview ticks
risks: None — volume is decorative; SMC analysis does not consume absolute volume from this UI series

summary: Splash bug: $effect cleanup canceled own dismiss timer, splash stuck on screen; SMC tooltip + chart bleed through. Fix: remove cleanup return + bump z-index 50 -> 9999.
verify: Playwright screenshot localhost-splash-T0.png: opaque #0D1117 bg covers entire 1920x1080 viewport, AI·ONE lockup centered, no chart bleed, no tooltip overlay
JS hash 6eyUjbQJ contains both 800 (MIN) and 5000 (MAX) literals
evaluate() polling at 100ms intervals across 2s misses splash entirely (round-trip latency exceeds 800ms dismiss window) -- screenshot is the authoritative visual evidence
visible_change: Splash now disappears cleanly after 800ms instead of sticking; full-viewport opaque overlay covers HUD + SMC tooltips + chart canvas during cold-load.
root_cause: Svelte 5 $effect re-runs on internal state mutation; previous code returned cleanup that called clearTimeout on its own scheduled timers, immediately clearing them. Result: dismissed never set true, splash perpetual. Plus z-index 50 < SMC tooltip z-index, so tooltip rendered on top.
fix: 1. Remove `return () => clearTimeout(t)` from $effect — let timers fire even on effect re-runs. 2. Bump splash z-index 50 -> 9999 to cover all higher-z overlays (HUD 35, tooltips ~100, AboutModal backdrop 200). 3. Drop fade-out keyframes that left splash at opacity 0.96 forever; rely on {#if renderSplash} unmount instead.
